abilities.name: Bomb Rack
abilities.description: Each time this model finishes a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Technodermis
abilities.description: Improve the Save and Wounds characteristics of this model by 1.

abilities.name: Void Shell
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Time Sink
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 4+, until the end of the turn, reduce the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that enemy unit by 1.

abilities.name: Arc Implants
abilities.description: Once per battle, in your opponent's Charge phase, just after this model's unit has been selected as a target of an enemy unit's charge, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Conversion Eradicator
abilities.description: Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Inverse Power Feeds
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by this model have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Hypercircuit
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** units (excluding **^^Vehicles^^**) from your Crusade army. Once per battle per selected unit, you can target that unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Hagioscope
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time an **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** unit from your Crusade army makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll, the Wound roll and the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Exo-gauntlet
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time an **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** unit from your Crusade army makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Ferrosanctic Orrery
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** units from your Crusade army, then select one objective marker that is not in your deployment zone. While a unit you selected for this ability is within range of that objective market, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Obscuroptikon
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Infantry^^** units from your Crusade army. Each time an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets one of those units, until the end of the phase, models in the targeted unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

abilities.name: Tri-dimensional Covenant
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Infantry^^** units from your Crusade army. Until the end of the battle, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for those units.

abilities.name: Augur of the First Reclamation
abilities.description: Add 2 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic, and at the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker that is not in your deployment zone, you gain 1CP. abilities.name: The Doom of Thorantus

abilities.name: Canticles of the Omnissiah
abilities.description:
At the start of your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Canticles of the Omnissiah section. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

Invocation of Machine Vengeance (Aura): At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Machine Vengeance target. Each time a model in a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit makes an attack that targets your Machine Vengeance target, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

Mantra of Discipline:  This model has the Battleline keyword and has the following ability:
Binharic Courage (Aura): While a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit and each time you take a Battle-shock or Leadership test for that unit, add 1 to that test.’

Shroudpsalm (Aura): While a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit is within 6" of this model, that unit has the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save

abilities.name: Data-spike
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy ^^**Vehicle^^** unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds and, until the end of the phase, the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that enemy unit is worsened by 1.

abilities.name: Cantic Thrallnet
abilities.description: At the start of the battle round, you can select one friendly SKITARII unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of the next battle round, the Protector Imperative and the Conqueror Imperative are both active for that unit.

abilities.name: Clandestine Infiltrator
abilities.description: The bearer, and models in any unit they are leading, have the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

abilities.name: Veiled Hunter
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three SKITARII INFANTRY units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Battle-Sphere Uplink
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Radial Suffusion
abilities.description: From the second battle round onwards, when resolving the Fallout effect of the Rad-bombardment Detachment rule, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of your opponent’s deployment zone, in addition to those that are within your opponent’s deployment zone.

abilities.name: Malphonic Susurrus
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Peerless Eradicator
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Autoclavic Denounciation
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] abilities.

abilities.name: Magos
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Genetor
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Logis
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of your Acquisition objective marker, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Artisan
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for that unit to an unmodified 6.

abilities.name: Mechanicus Locum
abilities.description: The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and, once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly CULT MECHANICUS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Mantle of the Gnosticarch
abilities.description: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abilities.name: Data-blessed Autosermon
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, you can select the Benediction of the Omnissiah you did not select at the start of the first battle round. abilities.name: Temporcopia
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Necromechanic
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw made for a friendly **^^Legio Cybernetica^^** or **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Vehicle^^** model within 12" of the bearer is failed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If they do, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Lord of Machines
abilities.description: Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

abilities.name: Emotionless Clarity
abilities.description: Once per turn, when a friendly LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE model with the Deadly Demise ability that is within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, do not roll to determine whether any mortal wounds are inflicted as a result of that model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

abilities.name: Arch Negator
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] ability.

abilities.name: Cognitive Reinforcement

abilities.name: Santified Ordnance
abilities.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. Add 6" to the range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit and, each time a Hazardous test is taken for that unit, you can re‑roll the result.

abilities.name: Inloaded Lethality

abilities.name: Omnissiah's Fury
abilities.description: **^^Skitarii Marshal^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Technodermis
abilities.description: Improve the Save and Wounds characteristics of this model by 1.

abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Time Sink
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 4+, until the end of the turn, reduce the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that enemy unit by 1.

abilities.description: Once per battle, in your opponent's Charge phase, just after this model's unit has been selected as a target of an enemy unit's charge, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Conversion Eradicator
abilities.description: Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Inverse Power Feeds
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by this model have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. abilities.name: Exo-gauntlet
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time an **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** unit from your Crusade army makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Ferrosanctic Orrery
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** units from your Crusade army, then select one objective marker that is not in your deployment zone. abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Infantry^^** units from your Crusade army. Until the end of the battle, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for those units.

abilities.name: Augur of the First Reclamation
abilities.description: Add 2 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic, and at the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker that is not in your deployment zone, you gain 1CP. In addition, at the end of the battle, if the bearer was in your Crusade army and you won that battle, roll one D6: on a 4+, your Crusade force acquires one Archeotech Part.

abilities.description:
This model must be attached to the following unit:
■ ^^**Kastelan Robots^^**

You must attach this model to a Kastelan Robots unit, even if one or more other Cybernetica Datasmith models havealready been attached to it. In such cases, if that bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths. If you cannot attach this model to a Kastelan Robots unit, this model cannot be deployed and counts as having been destroyed during the first battle round. While attached to a Kastelan Robots unit, this model loses the INFANTRY keyword.

abilities.name: Battle Protocols
abilities.description:
At the start of the battle, if this model is leading a ^^**Kastelan Robots^^** unit, that unit enters Aegis Protocols (see below). In your Command phase, if this model is leading a ^^**Kastelan Robots^^** unit, you can select one protocol from those listed below for that unit to enter. Once a unit enters a protocol, it remains in that protocol until it enters a different one
- Protector Protocol: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.
- Conqueror Protocol: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.
- Aegis Protocol: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.

When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Battle-Sphere Uplink
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Radial Suffusion
abilities.description: From the second battle round onwards, when resolving the Fallout effect of the Rad-bombardment Detachment rule, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of your opponent’s deployment zone, in addition to those that are within your opponent’s deployment zone.

abilities.name: Malphonic Susurrus
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Peerless Eradicator
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Autoclavic Denounciation
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] abilities.

abilities.name: Magos
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Genetor
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Logis
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of your Acquisition objective marker, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Artisan
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for that unit to an unmodified 6.

abilities.name: Mechanicus Locum
abilities.description: The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and, once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly CULT MECHANICUS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Mantle of the Gnosticarch
abilities.description: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abilities.name: Data-blessed Autosermon
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, you can select the Benediction of the Omnissiah you did not select at the start of the first battle round. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Benediction of the Omnissiah is active for the bearer’s unit in addition to the one that is currently active for your army.

abilities.name: Temporcopia
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Necromechanic
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw made for a friendly **^^Legio Cybernetica^^** or **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Vehicle^^** model within 12" of the bearer is failed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If they do, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Lord of Machines
abilities.description: Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

abilities.name: Emotionless Clarity
abilities.description: Once per turn, when a friendly LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE model with the Deadly Demise ability that is within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, do not roll to determine whether any mortal wounds are inflicted as a result of that model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

abilities.name: Arch Negator
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] ability.

abilities.name: Transoracular Dyad Wafers
abilities.description: CYBERNETICA DATASMITH model only. When the bearer is attached to a Kastelan Robots unit, until the end of the battle, models in that unit gain the Halo Override keyword. That unit cannot be selected when selecting units as part of the Noospheric Transference Detachment rule.

abilities.name: Cognitive Reinforcement
abilities.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only (excluding CYBERNETICA DATASMITH models). The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Santified Ordnance
abilities.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. Add 6" to the range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit and, each time a Hazardous test is taken for that unit, you can re‑roll the result.

abilities.name: Inloaded Lethality
abilities.description: **^^Tech-Priest Dominus^^** or **^^Tech-Priest Manipulus^^** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

abilities.name: Omnicogitator
abilities.description: **^^Skitarii Marshal^^** model only. The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Martial Signatum Amplificator
abilities.description: **^^Tech‑Priest^^** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the **^^Skitarii^^** keyword.

abilities.name: Belicosa-class Capacitor Vanes
abilities.description: **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit, and add 1 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons.

abilities.name: Omnissiah's Fury
abilities.description: **^^Skitarii Marshal^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Technodermis
abilities.description: Improve the Save and Wounds characteristics of this model by 1.

abilities.name: Void Shell
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Time Sink
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 4+, until the end of the turn, reduce the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that enemy unit by 1.

abilities.name: Arc Implants
abilities.description: Once per battle, in your opponent's Charge phase, just after this model's unit has been selected as a target of an enemy unit's charge, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Conversion Eradicator
abilities.description: Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Inverse Power Feeds
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by this model have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Hypercircuit
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** units (excluding **^^Vehicles^^**) from your Crusade army. Once per battle per selected unit, you can target that unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Hagioscope
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time an **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** unit from your Crusade army makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll, the Wound roll and the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Exo-gauntlet
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time an **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** unit from your Crusade army makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Ferrosanctic Orrery
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** units from your Crusade army, then select one objective marker that is not in your deployment zone. While a unit you selected for this ability is within range of that objective market, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Obscuroptikon
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Infantry^^** units from your Crusade army. Each time an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets one of those units, until the end of the phase, models in the targeted unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

abilities.name: Tri-dimensional Covenant
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Infantry^^** units from your Crusade army. Until the end of the battle, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for those units.

abilities.name: Augur of the First Reclamation
abilities.description: Add 2 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic, and at the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker that is not in your deployment zone, you gain 1CP. In addition, at the end of the battle, if the bearer was in your Crusade army and you won that battle, roll one D6: on a 4+, your Crusade force acquires one Archeotech Part.

abilities.name: The Doom of Thorantus
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy **^^Vehicle^^** unit within 18" of and visible to the bearer. Until the start of your next Movement phase, subtract 2 from the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit, and each time that unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Titan Guard
abilities.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase. When oing so, if there are one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Titanicus^^** units on the battlefield, you can re-roll the subsequent charge roll.

abilities.name: Secutarii
abilities.description: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Skitarii Vanguard^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Enhanced data-tether
abilities.description: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the IGNORES COVER ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.description: While this mdel has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Termite Assault
abilities.description: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

abilities.description: CYBERNETICA DATASMITH model only. When the bearer is attached to a Kastelan Robots unit, until the end of the battle, models in that unit gain the Halo Override keyword. That unit cannot be selected when selecting units as part of the Noospheric Transference Detachment rule.

abilities.name: Cognitive Reinforcement
abilities.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only (excluding CYBERNETICA DATASMITH models). The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Santified Ordnance
abilities.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. Add 6" to the range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit and, each time a Hazardous test is taken for that unit, you can re‑roll the result.

abilities.name: Inloaded Lethality
abilities.description: **^^Tech-Priest Dominus^^** or **^^Tech-Priest Manipulus^^** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

abilities.name: Omnicogitator
abilities.description: **^^Skitarii Marshal^^** model only. The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Martial Signatum Amplificator
abilities.description: **^^Tech‑Priest^^** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the **^^Skitarii^^** keyword.

abilities.name: Belicosa-class Capacitor Vanes
abilities.description: **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit, and add 1 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons.

abilities.name: Omnissiah's Fury
abilities.description: **^^Skitarii Marshal^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Technodermis
abilities.description: Improve the Save and Wounds characteristics of this model by 1.

abilities.name: Void Shell
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Time Sink
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 4+, until the end of the turn, reduce the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that enemy unit by 1.

abilities.name: Arc Implants
abilities.description: Once per battle, in your opponent's Charge phase, just after this model's unit has been selected as a target of an enemy unit's charge, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Conversion Eradicator
abilities.description: Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Inverse Power Feeds
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by this model have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** units (excluding **^^Vehicles^^**) from your Crusade army. Once per battle per selected unit, you can target that unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Hagioscope
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. abilities.name: Exo-gauntlet
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time an **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** unit from your Crusade army makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Ferrosanctic Orrery
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select up to two **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** units from your Crusade army, then select one objective marker that is not in your deployment zone. abilities.name: Obscuroptikon

abilities.name: Augur of the First Reclamation
abilities.description: Add 2 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic, and at the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker that is not in your deployment zone, you gain 1CP. abilities.name: Icon of War
abilities.description:
**Fanatical Devotion:** You can select one friendly **^^Skitarii^^** or **^^Thulia Ghuld^^** unit within 6" of this model; until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

**Adaptive Tactics:** You can select one friendly **^^Skitarii^^** or **^^Thulia Ghuld^^** unit within 6" of this model; until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

**The Fires of Mars:** You can select one friendly **^^Skitarii^^** or **^^Thulia Ghuld^^** unit within 6" of this model; until the start of your next Command phase, the Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for that unit.

abilities.name: Mechanicus Bodyguard
abilities.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Secutor of Olympus

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.description: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Rod of the War Forge
abilities.description: In your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Icon of War section. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Cybernetic Augmentation
abilities.description: This model can move through terrain features, but cannot end a move within a wall, a floor, etc. This model can be set up or end a move on any floor level of **^^Ruins^^**, but if that level is not the ground floor, it can only do so if its base does not overhang the floor at that level.

enhancements.name: Cantic Thrallnet
enhancements.description: At the start of the battle round, you can select one friendly SKITARII unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of the next battle round, the Protector Imperative and the Conqueror Imperative are both active for that unit.

enhancements.name: Clandestine Infiltrator
enhancements.description: The bearer, and models in any unit they are leading, have the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

enhancements.name: Veiled Hunter
enhancements.description: After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three SKITARII INFANTRY units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Battle-Sphere Uplink
enhancements.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Radial Suffusion
enhancements.description: From the second battle round onwards, when resolving the Fallout effect of the Rad-bombardment Detachment rule, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of your opponent’s deployment zone, in addition to those that are within your opponent’s deployment zone.

enhancements.name: Malphonic Susurrus
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Peerless Eradicator
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Autoclavic Denounciation
enhancements.description: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Magos
enhancements.description: At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Genetor
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Logis
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of your Acquisition objective marker, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Artisan
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for that unit to an unmodified 6.

enhancements.name: Mechanicus Locum
enhancements.description: The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and, once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly CULT MECHANICUS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

enhancements.name: Mantle of the Gnosticarch
enhancements.description: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

enhancements.name: Data-blessed Autosermon
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, you can select the Benediction of the Omnissiah you did not select at the start of the first battle round. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Benediction of the Omnissiah is active for the bearer’s unit in addition to the one that is currently active for your army.

enhancements.name: Temporcopia
enhancements.description: The bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Necromechanic
enhancements.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw made for a friendly **^^Legio Cybernetica^^** or **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Vehicle^^** model within 12" of the bearer is failed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If they do, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Lord of Machines
enhancements.description: Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

enhancements.name: Emotionless Clarity
enhancements.description: Once per turn, when a friendly LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE model with the Deadly Demise ability that is within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, do not roll to determine whether any mortal wounds are inflicted as a result of that model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

enhancements.name: Arch Negator
enhancements.description: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] ability.

enhancements.name: Transoracular Dyad Wafers
enhancements.description: CYBERNETICA DATASMITH model only. When the bearer is attached to a Kastelan Robots unit, until the end of the battle, models in that unit gain the Halo Override keyword. That unit cannot be selected when selecting units as part of the Noospheric Transference Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Cognitive Reinforcement
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only (excluding CYBERNETICA DATASMITH models). The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Sanctified Ordnance
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. Add 6" to the range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit and, each time a Hazardous test is taken for that unit, you can re‑roll the result.

enhancements.name: Inloaded Lethality
enhancements.description: **^^Tech-Priest Dominus^^** or **^^Tech-Priest Manipulus^^** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.
